title: Not all Columns Showing on Zapier
excerpt: When trying to create/update an item on a board it isn’t showing every single column. Seems to limit the amount being show after 15-20 columns already being shown.

posts.author: masonkh (Mason Kerns-Harper)
posts.cookedHtml: When trying to create/update an item on a board it isn’t showing every single column. Seems to limit the amount being show after 15-20 columns already being shown.
